components.name: container
components.description: Max-width wrapper with responsive horizontal padding for centering page content.

components.name: grid
components.description: Responsive column grid with 2, 3, and 4 column variants and configurable gap.

components.name: section
components.description: Full-width content section with consistent vertical rhythm and optional background.

components.name: divider
components.description: Horizontal rule and visual separator with optional label text.

components.name: heading
components.description: h1–h6 headings with aesthetic-appropriate sizing, weight, and line height.

components.name: paragraph
components.description: Body text with proper line height, measure, and muted secondary variant.

components.name: prose
components.description: Long-form content container for articles and blog posts with full typographic rhythm.

components.name: code-block
components.description: Monospaced code display with syntax-highlighted appearance and copy affordance.

components.name: button
components.description: Primary, secondary, ghost, and destructive button variants with hover and focus states.

components.name: button-group
components.description: Horizontally grouped action buttons with joined borders and shared context.

components.name: link
components.description: Styled anchor with underline, hover, and focus states for inline and standalone use.

components.name: dropdown
components.description: Click-triggered action menu with keyboard navigation and outside-click dismissal.

components.name: input
components.description: Text input with label, placeholder, helper text, and error state.

components.name: textarea
components.description: Multiline text input with label, auto-resize affordance, and error state.

components.name: select
components.description: Native select element with custom styled wrapper, label, and error state.

components.name: checkbox
components.description: Styled checkbox with label, checked state, and indeterminate support.

components.name: radio
components.description: Styled radio button group with label and selected state.

components.name: toggle
components.description: On/off switch with animated thumb and accessible checked state.

components.name: form-group
components.description: Composed form layout combining label, input, helper text, and validation error.

components.name: card
components.description: Content container in basic, elevated, and interactive variants with consistent padding.

components.name: table
components.description: Data table with header row, striped rows, and horizontal scroll on small viewports.

components.name: stat
components.description: Key metric display showing a headline number, label, and optional trend indicator.

components.name: badge
components.description: Compact status indicator and label tag in multiple semantic color variants.

components.name: avatar
components.description: User image in circle with fallback initials and size variants.

components.name: list
components.description: Structured list in simple, icon-prefixed, and description variants.

components.name: navbar
components.description: Top navigation bar with logo, link list, and action slot.

components.name: sidebar
components.description: Vertical navigation panel with grouped links, icons, and active state.

components.name: breadcrumb
components.description: Hierarchical path indicator with separator glyphs and truncation on long paths.

components.name: tabs
components.description: Tabbed content switcher with active underline and keyboard arrow-key navigation.

components.name: pagination
components.description: Page navigation controls with previous, next, and numbered page buttons.

components.name: footer
components.description: Site footer with multi-column link groups, logo, and copyright line.

components.name: modal
components.description: Dialog overlay with backdrop, close button, focus trap, and Escape key dismissal.

components.name: drawer
components.description: Slide-in panel from screen edge with backdrop and animated entrance.

components.name: tooltip
components.description: Hover-triggered short text label anchored to a target element.

components.name: popover
components.description: Click-triggered rich content popup with arrow and outside-click dismissal.

components.name: toast
components.description: Transient notification message that auto-dismisses with success, warning, and error variants.

components.name: hero
components.description: Full-width intro section with headline, subheading, and primary call-to-action.

components.name: cta
components.description: Call-to-action banner with headline, supporting text, and one or two action buttons.

components.name: feature-grid
components.description: Multi-feature showcase grid with icon, title, and short description per feature.

components.name: testimonial
components.description: Pull quote with attribution name, title, and optional avatar.

components.name: pricing-table
components.description: Tier comparison layout with feature lists, price display, and highlighted recommended plan.

components.name: faq
components.description: Collapsible question-and-answer list with accordion expand and collapse behavior.

base.description: Neutral structural templates — unstyled, accessible, gray-scale. The unbranded foundation.

aesthetics.name: slate
aesthetics.description: Layered, decisive, geological. Cool blue-gray tones with sharp cleaved edges, matte surfaces, and indigo accents. Stratified shadows suggest metamorphic rock strata. Suited for developer tools, SaaS platforms, and technical products.
